prompt:
Use case: identity-preserve
Asset type: runtime tactics unit sprite test rework
Primary request: redo this exact approved Order House Marshal so it looks clearer and less yellow-washed while still reading as the same unit
Subject: preserve the exact approved House Marshal with the same closed helmet, same armor layout, same vertical rifle hold, same cape shape, same pouch arrangement, same ivory tabard, same red cross shape and placement, same pose, same silhouette, and same overall identity
Style/medium: preserve the same painterly pixel-art-inspired tactics sprite finish, moderate pixelation level, readable broad shapes, and runtime-game clarity as the input image
Composition/framing: preserve the exact same full-body crop, stance, orientation, pose, and tight sprite bounds; do not redesign or reinterpret anything
Lighting/mood: same moody bunker-forged military atmosphere as the approved sprite, but with cleaner steel surfaces, clearer ivory cloth, and less muddy amber haze over the whole figure
Color palette: preserve the exact Order palette already present in the input image: weathered iron black, aged brass, dark wine red, parchment ivory, and bold red heraldry; only reduce the yellow cast and improve separation between metal, cloth, and leather
Materials/textures: brushed steel armor, worn cloth tabard, waxed cape fabric, weathered leather pouches, relic firearm metal
Constraints: change only color balance, contrast grouping, and material clarity; preserve the exact armor plate shapes, exact cross shape and placement, exact cloth and tabard shapes, exact rifle shape and position, exact cape silhouette, exact pouches, exact proportions, exact pose, and exact faction identity; this must still read as the same approved sprite, not a redesign; exactly one subject; no floor; no scenery; no text; no extra subjects; alpha only outside the outer silhouette; avoid oversized transparent padding
Avoid: any armor redesign, any pose change, any cross redesign, any cloth redesign, any silhouette drift, any new details, any removed details, blue sci-fi tint, cyan lighting, desaturation, glossy rendering, anime rendering, noisy micro-detail, soft blur, cinematic background
